title.en: Countless people shouted, as if they had become...

content.en:
"Xiao Yue!"

"Xiao Yue!"

"Xiao Yue!"

Countless people shouted, as if they had become Xiao Yue's fans.

I have to say that after this battle, Xiao Yue's popularity in the quasi-Dao world skyrocketed countless times in an instant.

At this moment, Xiao Yue undoubtedly became the highest caller among the gods and generals present, and even locked one of the places.

The eyes of the other god generals looking at Xiao Yue were full of solemnity and jealousy, but there were a few god generals who were very calm, as if they didn't care about Xiao Yue's strength at all.

The game continues!

Xiao Yue then fought with the cold-blooded god general and the cloudless god general one by one, and these two people turned out to be ten-star god generals, but they still lost to Xiao Yue, which made Xiao Yue's prestige even higher.

The reincarnation god general and the ice and rain god will be one by one with Xiao Yue, and they have always been in their heyday.

It is worth mentioning that the battle between the Wasteland Divine General and the Baohu Divine General, this battle can be described as very exciting, and even more exciting than the battle between Xiao Yue and the Hongyin Divine General to a certain extent.

These two god generals also exposed their strength, and they are also ten-star god generals.

One of the three dark horses, the Arayu God General, has a great reputation and strength, even greater than the reputation of the first in each group, after all, the first in each group has been defeated in a row before, and the first place in the group is nothing.

As a result, many people believe that the god of Aranyu will defeat the god of Baohu.

In fact, you can't blame others for thinking so, because the Baohu God General only looks stable, and his strength is not very outstanding.

Previously, the battle between the Baohu God General and other God Generals was basically to condense a lake and sea to suppress the enemy, and rely on time to slowly consume the power of the other God Generals, so as to win the game.

In the eyes of others, the Baohu God General can only bully and bully the weak, and in the face of the equally powerful Desolate God General, it will definitely be invincible.

Then, the results were too unexpected.

The Treasure Lake Gods won, and it seems to be an easy win!

In fact, the battle between the Treasure Lake Divine General and the Desolate Divine General is still condensing a lake and sea to suppress the Desolate Divine General, but the defense and power are dozens of times larger.

Moreover, the Treasure Lake Divine General actually condensed a Heavenly Destiny Realm Chaos Life in the lake and sea, although it was not a real Chaos Life, it was just a creature transformed by power.

There are a lot of them, and all of them are powerful.

Under the siege of the Heavenly Destiny Realm Chaotic Life, the Desolate Universe Divine General was seriously injured before his strength was exhausted, and he had no choice but to admit defeat.

And this battle also makes people see the difficulty of the Baohu God General, in terms of attack power or strength, the Bao Hu God General is really not as good as the Wild Universe Divine General, but the Wild Universe God General has no choice but to help the Baohu Divine General, so he lost the game.

Of course.

This also has something to do with the field, if it is in the outside world, even if the Arayu God General can't beat the Baohu God General, he can completely escape, and even attack from a long distance, and get the hope of winning.

But a game is a game, and it's impossible to fight on your own terms.

Although the Wasteland God General lost, he was not frustrated at all, after all, he also won a place steadily, definitely within the top ten.

But the rewards of the top ten and the top three are definitely different, although this time it is the top ten who get the quota to enter the talent ancestral pool, but the higher the ranking, the more rewards there will be.

This point was vaguely mentioned to them by the forces behind it, but they did not specifically say any reward.

The real reward is only known to the Dao Ancestors, and it will never be announced until the last moment.

Soon, another game -

The Ice Rain God will fight against Xiao Yue, and these two are both female God Generals, so they attract a lot of attention, even the high-ranking Dao Ancestor incarnations have cast their eyes one by one, and they are seriously observing this battle.

The Ice Rain God will be powerful in the ice system supernatural power-the ice-free domain, coupled with its own ice and snow holy body, and Xiao Yue's main strength is in the comprehensive, with almost no defects.

The two of them played, and the Ice Rain God General showed the strength of the Ten Star God General, and the Ice-Free Domain was also deployed.

But in the next moment, she used an unprecedented method.

Rumble!!!!!

An ice sculpture of a majestic goddess appeared above the Ice Rain God General, but it was not a real ice sculpture, but a kind of bloodline phantom.

"Daozu bloodline, she is the second-generation descendant of Daozu, and she has the most direct bloodline!"

One of the Dao Ancestors exclaimed.

At this moment, countless people were shocked and even puzzled.

The second-generation descendants of Daozu, this is not as simple as the son and daughter of Daozu, if Daozu gave birth to descendants before becoming Daozu, then these second-generation descendants cannot be called second-generation descendants of Daozu, they can only be called descendants, and they do not even have the bloodline of Daozu.

After all, the descendants of Dao Ancestors who were born before they became Dao Ancestors, and if they become Dao Ancestors later, it is impossible for the bloodline to be transferred to the descendants.

But it is too difficult to become a Dao Ancestor and then give birth to a descendant!

There is a limit to the number of descendants that can be born in a lifetime of a living being, of course, except for some races, but even if it is a special race, it is difficult to give birth to a few descendants at the level of Dao Ancestor.

For a long time, they still hadn't heard of any Dao Ancestor giving birth to a descendant.

But now, the Ice Rain Divine General has shown the Dao Ancestor Phantom, which means that she has the direct bloodline of the Dao Ancestor, and she must be in the second generation, if it is the third generation, no matter how strong the bloodline is, it is impossible to summon the Dao Ancestor Phantom at the level of the God General.

This is not considered cheating, but belongs to the Ice Rain God's own power, so it is not a violation.

"Who will be the descendant of the Ice Rain God?"

Many Dao Ancestors were curious.

The Ice Rain God will be the god general of the Giant Axe City, and the Giant Axe City only has those Dao Ancestors, but those Dao Ancestors in the Giant Axe City do not have the Dao Ancestors who take the Ice Dao!

And this Dao Ancestor Phantom was an Ice Dao Ancestor, which was different from what they knew.

"There's no need to guess, the Ice Rain God will be a descendant of our city ancestor, but the bloodline she got comes from her mother!"

A Dao Ancestor of Giant Axe City spoke.

"Chengzu, it's him, it's no wonder, it is rumored that Chengzu has some ...... with a mysterious female Daozu I didn't expect that the city ancestor would really give birth to a descendant!"

Many Dao Ancestors suddenly realized.

That's when the battle in the ring really began.

The Ice Rain God General summoned the Dao Ancestor Phantom who belonged to the second generation of Dao Ancestor's descendants, this is the power of the Dao Ancestor's bloodline, this power grade is too high, and it greatly increases the strength of the Ice Rain God General.

For a moment, Xiao Yue was completely suppressed.

After all, in terms of bloodline alone, Xiao Yue was completely at a disadvantage.

If Xiao Yue didn't have any means, I'm afraid she would lose.

The Void Heaven Temple is a battle station.

Long Hai Zhenjun sent a message to Ye Tian: "Little junior brother, I'm afraid Xiao Yue is a little bad!"

"Senior Brother Long Hai, it's just an ice and rain god general, it's nothing!"

Ye Tian is still very confident.

"Oh, could it be that Xiao Yue still has hole cards?" Long Hai Zhenjun was extremely surprised in his heart.

After all, it would be terrible to fight until this time, and still have strong hole cards!

At this moment, a full moon appeared behind Xiao Yue, and the whole person seemed to be in the middle of a full moon, and the power of endless moonlight formed a realm the size of a world.

This is an anomaly that belongs to Xiao Yue's powerful physique!

This physique is called the Polar Moon Holy Body!

The Chaos Alchemy Technique that Ye Tian created for Xiao Yue was called the Polar Moon Alchemy Technique, and when the gods cultivated the level to the extreme, they could condense the Polar Moon Holy Body.

Before, Xiao Yue had never urged her physique, but now as soon as she urged it, she formed such a terrifying physique vision, and her whole person's momentum completely skyrocketed.

After urging the Polar Moon Holy Body, Xiao Yue cast another chaotic supernatural power that matched the Polar Moon Holy Body-

The Holy Sword of the Yin!

This is a terrifying chaotic supernatural power from the Divine Heaven Realm, second only to the Eternal Spear in power, but it is the most suitable chaotic supernatural power for Xiao Yue, and under the amplification of the Polar Moon Holy Body, its power exceeds that of the Eternal Spear.

"Fall!"

The Yin Holy Sword fell, slashing towards the Dao Ancestor Phantom of the Ice Rain God General.

Boom!

The Dao Ancestor's phantom shattered, and the ice-free domain of the Ice Rain God was also cracked, and the whole person kept retreating, and kept coughing up blood.

"Ice rain, admit defeat quickly!"

Dao Ancestor of Giant Axe City hurriedly said.

Bingyu is the daughter of the city ancestor, and she is the only daughter, how noble her identity is, if she didn't know that Bingyu's strength is very strong, and this time the opportunity is too great, Giant Axe City would not dare to let her participate in this competition.

Now, Bing Yu was injured, and he was seriously injured, and that Dao Ancestor of Giant Axe City panicked.

Bingyu heard Daozu's summons, and also knew that her strength was not Xiao Yue's opponent, although she still had hole cards, there was no need to really fight to the death.

Besides, who can guarantee that Xiao Yue has no hole cards, if she really fights to the death, it will be difficult to keep her hands, maybe she will fall.

"I throw in the towel!"

The God of Ice and Rain will admit defeat.
